data.title: Binance Coin forecast aims for $650-$680 recovery by April 2026 with 6-11% upside potential despite resistance at $620.
data.description: The price prediction for Binance Coin (BNB) indicates a possible increase of 6-11%, reaching the range of $650-$680, despite the current market downturn. The direction of the near-term forecast for BNB will be influenced by the key resistance level at $620.

data.title: Bitcoin could reach $69,000 in April after bouncing from $65,500 support with RSI at 41.21. Recovery expected to $69,000-$70,000 range if current levels hold.
data.description: Bitcoin appears to be bouncing back from the $65,500 support level, showing signs of being oversold with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 41.21. Experts predict that the price of BTC could potentially recover to a range of $69,000 to $70,000 if buyers can maintain the current levels and defend against further declines.

data.title: ETH expected to reach $2,100-$2,200 in April 2026. Currently at $2,002 with RSI at 43.05. Rally possible if break above $2,034.
data.description: The current trading price for Ethereum is $2,002, placing it in a neutral territory with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 43.05. Analysis indicates a possible rally for Ethereum towards the range of $2,100 to $2,200 if it manages to surpass the resistance level at $2,034.

data.title: University of Phoenix White Paper Translates "Sandwich Generation" Research into Employer Strategies to Improve Retention and Workforce Stability
data.description: A recent study conducted by Dr. TaMika Fuller and Dr. Victoria Lender underscores the positive impact of assisting working caregivers in minimizing burnout, boosting engagement, and enhancing organizational effectiveness. The findings were revealed in a report from the University of Phoenix College of Doctoral Studies based in Phoenix. This research highlights the potential benefits for companies that prioritize support for employees juggling work and caregiving responsibilities. By offering assistance to these individuals, organizations can potentially reduce burnout rates, increase levels of engagement among employees, and ultimately drive improved performance within the company.

data.title: Marvell, Caterpillar Lead Five Stocks To Watch In Weak, Volatile Market
data.description: Last week, Marvell's stock saw a strong rally despite a market downturn after initially pulling back from a buy point. Alongside Marvell, Caterpillar demonstrated resilience as an AI stock with robust performance. These two companies, among others, are being closely monitored as top performers in the current weak and volatile market environment.

data.title: Top fine dining chefs now showcasing their talents in exclusive residencies, elevating culinary experiences. #highprofile #gastronomy
data.description: As per recent reports, over 500 people have been affected by a sudden outbreak of a mysterious illness in a remote village. Around 300 individuals have been hospitalized, with 50 in critical condition. Medical teams have been dispatched to provide care and investigate the cause of the outbreak. The local health department is urging people to take precautions and seek immediate medical attention if they experience any symptoms.Authorities are working on identifying the source of the illness to prevent further spread in the community.

data.title: Dow Jones Dives As Oil Prices Hit $100 Amid Iran War; Tesla Looms
data.description: Stock markets experienced a significant decline, reaching the lowest levels in six months, due to the soaring oil prices close to $100 amid escalating tensions in Iran. Concurrently, investors are eagerly anticipating the upcoming Tesla delivery numbers. Notably, the Dow Jones index plunged amidst these developments.

data.title: Visa, Street Soccer USA and Bank of America to Bring Visa Street Soccer Parks to Every FIFA World Cup 2026™ Host City in the U.S.
data.description: As the countdown to the FIFA World Cup 2026™ reaches 75 days, Visa and its partners are increasing community investment efforts to provide greater access to sports, education, and opportunities in various U.S. communities. The initiative aims to benefit a wide range of areas, such as San Francisco and Charlotte, N.C. Through this expansion, Visa is committed to making a significant impact by improving access to resources for residents. The announcement was made on March 28, 2026, through a press release published on PRNewswire. This move showcases Visa's dedication to enhancing community well-being ahead of the highly anticipated World Cup, emphasizing the importance of investing in local initiatives.

data.title: Rocket Lab Successfully Launches 85th Mission and First Dedicated Launch for European Space Agency
data.description: Two satellites were launched into low Earth orbit by Rocket Lab on behalf of the European Space Agency (ESA) to trial new navigation systems.

data.title: Stena RoRo takes delivery of the 13th E-Flexer from the China Merchants Industry shipyard in Weihai, China
data.description: Stena RoRo has recently received the 13th vessel in a series of 15 E-Flexer RoPax ferries from China Merchants Industry shipyard in Weihai, China. This newly acquired ship, named Capu Rossu, has been transferred to CORSICA LINEA subsequent to its delivery to Stena RoRo. The vessel is set to commence its commercial operations soon.

data.title: US authorities are investigating China's Bitmain over security concerns with "Operation Red Sunset" involving potential espionage and grid risks.
data.description: Last year, US authorities initiated an investigation named "Operation Red Sunset" regarding Bitmain's activities. The probe focused on concerns related to espionage and risks to the grid.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Small Caps, Techs Lead Gains; This Nuclear Play Breaks Out But Micron Sinks (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw a rise following the announcement of a peace plan sent by President Donald Trump to Iran. However, oil prices experienced a significant decrease. Small caps and tech stocks led the gains in the stock market. Additionally, a nuclear company's stock surged while Micron's stock sunk.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Trump Says This; Cathie Wood Snaps Up IPO Stock Amid 84% Dive (Live Coverage)
data.description: Following President Trump's remarks on Iran, the Dow Jones experienced a surge in numbers today. A pharmaceutical company made its stock market debut, and notable investor Cathie Wood made significant stock purchases. The developments in the stock market today led to an 84% decrease in IPO stock value. The latest updates on these events can be found in the live coverage of the stock market.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico Announces the Payment of Bond Certificate “GAP 23L” for Ps.1,120.0 Million
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico on March 23, 2026, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. disclosed that it has settled the bond certificate marked as “GAP 23L.” This particular certificate amounted to 11.2 million certificates, totaling Ps.1,120.0 million. The company, represented by GAP and listed on NYSE under PAC and BMV under GAP, completed this payment today.

data.title: Draganfly Stock Sheds 21% Post-Earnings — Here's Why It's Still A Buy
data.description: Drone technology company Draganfly Inc. (NASDAQ: DPRO) experienced a significant decrease in its stock value on Wednesday following disappointing fourth-quarter earnings results. Despite this, the report and future outlook indicate a potential buying opportunity for investors willing to endure volatility. DPRO shares plummeted over 21% after the latest quarterly report revealed a wider loss and lower revenue compared to analyst predictions. The company reported a quarterly loss of 24 cents per share, well below the estimated loss of 13 cents per share. Revenue also missed expectations by almost 19%, causing a shift in short-term investor sentiment. The company’s gross margin decreased to approximately 17%, contributing to concerns about profitability. This decline in stock value presents a speculative buying opportunity for investors.

data.title: Ondas, GameStop, PDD and More Stocks With Earnings This Week
data.description: The latest earning season is nearly over, but there are still anticipated reports from retail investors' favored companies this week. ONDS stock surged post-earnings announcement - revealing impressive fiscal 2026 revenue projections totaling no less than $375 million. The drone technology firm disclosed a loss of 36 cents per share, falling short of the predicted five cents, yet revenue stood at $30.1 million, surpassing the forecasted $27.6 million. WeRide Inc. also shared their Q4 results, displaying a narrower loss per share than expected, and revenue exceeding projections. Moving forward, Retail investors eagerly await GameStop Corp.'s fourth-quarter results after market close on Tuesday. Stay updated on notable earnings highlights by visiting Benzinga.com.

data.title: Leading Vision Insurance (March 2026): VSP Individual Vision Plans Named Top Vision Coverage Provider by Expert Consumers
data.description: In the latest rankings released by Expert Consumers in March 2026, VSP Individual Vision Plans emerged as a top vision coverage provider, lauded for its extensive network of eye care specialists. The recognition underscores VSP's diverse range of vision insurance options.

data.title: In the 1970s, oil shocks led to gas lines and a fourfold increase in oil prices, reshaping global finance. Will Iran war do the same?
data.description: American consumers were left alarmed by gas lines and a quadrupling of oil prices. Moreover, the oil crises had a significant impact on global finance, leading to major transformations in the industry.

data.title: Tech executives in Silicon Valley are opting for "tiny teams," consisting of just one person and A.I., as artificial intelligence takes on more tasks.
data.description: As the utilization of artificial intelligence expands, tech leaders are increasingly establishing teams consisting of just two members: one individual alongside AI.

data.title: Russian bakery faces survival amid 3,500% tax hike, showcasing economic turmoil near Moscow.
data.description: A small-business owner in the vicinity of Moscow is currently grappling with difficulties that shed light on the precarious state of Russia's economy, which has been significantly impacted by the ongoing war. This situation underscores the looming threat of a major crisis, with the country's economic stability hanging in the balance.
